languages.text: {n}Эоганн протягивает к твари мехадендрит-диагностор, но тут же отдергивает: существо встречает протянутую конечность манипулуса угрожающим рычанием. Техножрец не предпринимает повторную попытку — внезапно замерев, он смотрит на муки существа со странным выражением, словно он сейчас не здесь.{/n}

{n}Eogunn reaches out toward the creature with a diagnostor mechadendrite, only to recoil immediately as the beast greets the Manipulus's extended limb with a menacing snarl. The Tech-Priest does not make a second attempt — suddenly going still, he gazes upon the creature's agony with a strange expression, as though his mind has wandered elsewhere.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн протягивает к твари мехадендрит-диагностор, но тут же отдергивает: существо встречает протянутую конечность манипулуса угрожающим рычанием. Техножрец не предпринимает повторную попытку — внезапно замерев, он смотрит на муки существа со странным выражением, словно он сейчас не здесь.{/n}

The Tech-Priest does not make a second attempt — suddenly turning rigid, he gazes upon the creature's agony with a strange expression, as though his mind has wandered elsewhere.{/n}

{n}Eogunn reaches out toward the creature with a diagnostor mechadendrite, only to recoil immediately as the beast greets the Manipulus's extended limb with a menacing snarl. The Tech-Priest does not make a second attempt — suddenly going still, he gazes upon the creature's agony with a strange expression, as though his mind has wandered elsewhere.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn extiende una mecadendrita de diagnóstico hacia la criatura, pero retrae la extremidad al instante cuando la bestia le dedica un gruñido de amenaza. El tecnosacerdote no realiza un segundo intento, sino que se queda en perfecto silencio, con la mirada fija en la agonía de la criatura y una expresión extraña, como si su mente estuviera en otra parte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn reaches out toward the creature with a diagnostor mechadendrite, only to recoil immediately as the beast greets the Manipulus's extended limb with a menacing snarl. The Tech-Priest does not make a second attempt — suddenly going still, he gazes upon the creature's agony with a strange expression, as though his mind has wandered elsewhere.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn extiende una mecadendrita de diagnóstico hacia la criatura, pero retrae la extremidad al instante cuando la bestia le dedica un gruñido de amenaza. El tecnosacerdote no realiza un segundo intento, sino que se queda en perfecto silencio, con la mirada fija en la agonía de la criatura y una expresión extraña, como si su mente estuviera en otra parte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡将一根诊断机械触须伸向那生物，但它立刻朝伸来的触须发出充满威胁的低吼，迫使操纵者当即缩了回去。这位技术神甫没有再尝试——他突然僵在原地，用古怪的神情注视着那生物所承受的痛苦，思绪仿佛已经飘到了别处。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn reaches out toward the creature with a diagnostor mechadendrite, only to recoil immediately as the beast greets the Manipulus's extended limb with a menacing snarl. The Tech-Priest does not make a second attempt — suddenly going still, he gazes upon the creature's agony with a strange expression, as though his mind has wandered elsewhere.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡将一根诊断机械触须伸向那生物，但它立刻朝伸来的触须发出充满威胁的低吼，迫使操纵者当即缩了回去。这位技术神甫没有再尝试——他突然僵在原地，用古怪的神情注视着那生物所承受的痛苦，思绪仿佛已经飘到了别处。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn nähert sich der Kreatur mit einem Diagnostor-Mechadendriten, zieht ihn aber rasch wieder zurück, als die Bestie die ausgefahrene Gliedmaße des Manipulus mit einem drohenden Knurren begrüßt. Der Techpriester unternimmt keinen zweiten Versuch ... stattdessen betrachtet er schweigend das Leid der Kreatur, als wäre er mit seinen Gedanken an einem anderen Ort.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn reaches out toward the creature with a diagnostor mechadendrite, only to recoil immediately as the beast greets the Manipulus's extended limb with a menacing snarl. The Tech-Priest does not make a second attempt — suddenly going still, he gazes upon the creature's agony with a strange expression, as though his mind has wandered elsewhere.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn nähert sich der Kreatur mit einem Diagnostor-Mechadendriten, zieht ihn aber rasch wieder zurück, als die Bestie die ausgefahrene Gliedmaße des Manipulus mit einem drohenden Knurren begrüßt. Der Techpriester unternimmt keinen zweiten Versuch ... stattdessen betrachtet er schweigend das Leid der Kreatur, als wäre er mit seinen Gedanken an einem anderen Ort.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn approche de la créature une mécadendrite équipée d'un diagnostiqueur, mais il recule immédiatement quand elle accueille le membre tendu du manipulus avec un grondement menaçant. Le technoprêtre n'ose pas renouveler l'expérience ; subitement immobile, il observe l'agonie de la bête avec une expression étrange, comme s'il avait l'esprit ailleurs.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn reaches out toward the creature with a diagnostor mechadendrite, only to recoil immediately as the beast greets the Manipulus's extended limb with a menacing snarl. The Tech-Priest does not make a second attempt — suddenly going still, he gazes upon the creature's agony with a strange expression, as though his mind has wandered elsewhere.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn approche de la créature une mécadendrite équipée d'un diagnostiqueur, mais il recule immédiatement quand elle accueille le membre tendu du manipulus avec un grondement menaçant. Le technoprêtre n'ose pas renouveler l'expérience ; subitement immobile, il observe l'agonie de la bête avec une expression étrange, comme s'il avait l'esprit ailleurs.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, teşhis mekadentritini yaratığa doğru uzanıyor. Yaratığın Manipülus'un uzanan uzvunu tehditkâr bir hırlamayla karşılaması üzerine anında geri çekiliyor. Tekno Rahip, ikinci bir denemede bulunmuyor. Aniden hareketsizleşerek sanki zihni başka bir yere kaymış gibi tuhaf bir ifadeyle yaratığın can çekişmesini izliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn reaches out toward the creature with a diagnostor mechadendrite, only to recoil immediately as the beast greets the Manipulus's extended limb with a menacing snarl. The Tech-Priest does not make a second attempt — suddenly going still, he gazes upon the creature's agony with a strange expression, as though his mind has wandered elsewhere.{/n}

Tekno Rahip, ikinci bir denemede bulunmuyor. Aniden hareketsizleşerek sanki zihni başka bir yere kaymış gibi tuhaf bir ifadeyle yaratığın can çekişmesini izliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオグンは診断用機械枝を伸ばしてその生物に近づこうとするが、その生物はマニピュラスの伸ばした肢を威嚇するような唸り声と共に受け止める。テクプリストは二度と試みることはなく、突然動きを止めてその生物の苦しみを奇妙な表情で眺めている。まるで彼の心がどこか遠くへ旅立ったかのように。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn reaches out toward the creature with a diagnostor mechadendrite, only to recoil immediately as the beast greets the Manipulus's extended limb with a menacing snarl. The Tech-Priest does not make a second attempt — suddenly going still, he gazes upon the creature's agony with a strange expression, as though his mind has wandered elsewhere.{/n}
